parameters.query:
-- New vehicles: in inventory, not yet posted, HAS PHOTOS
WITH new_vehicles AS (
  SELECT v.stock_number, i.title, i.price, v.year, v.make, v.model, v.mileage,
    v.exterior_color, i.hero_image_url,
    jsonb_array_length(COALESCE(i.image_urls, '[]'::jsonb)) as photo_count
  FROM inventory_items i
  JOIN inventory_vehicles v ON v.item_id = i.id
  WHERE i.status = 'active'
    AND i.price > 0
    AND jsonb_array_length(COALESCE(i.image_urls, '[]'::jsonb)) > 0
    AND v.stock_number NOT IN (
      SELECT vehicle_id FROM marketplace_listings WHERE status IN ('active', 'excluded')
    )
  ORDER BY i.first_seen_at DESC
  LIMIT 5
),
-- Expiring listings: posted > 25 days ago
expiring AS (
  SELECT ml.vehicle_id, ml.posted_at, ml.expires_at,
    i.title, i.price, v.year, v.make, v.model
  FROM marketplace_listings ml
  JOIN inventory_vehicles v ON v.stock_number = ml.vehicle_id
  JOIN inventory_items i ON i.id = v.item_id
  WHERE ml.status = 'active'
    AND ml.expires_at < now() + interval '5 days'
    AND i.status = 'active'
),
-- Sold vehicles: listed on marketplace but no longer in active inventory
sold AS (
  SELECT ml.vehicle_id, ml.fb_listing_url, ml.posted_at
  FROM marketplace_listings ml
  WHERE ml.status = 'active'
    AND ml.vehicle_id NOT IN (
      SELECT v.stock_number FROM inventory_vehicles v
      JOIN inventory_items i ON i.id = v.item_id
      WHERE i.status = 'active'
    )
)
SELECT 'new' as category, json_agg(row_to_json(n)) as vehicles FROM new_vehicles n
UNION ALL
SELECT 'expiring', json_agg(row_to_json(e)) FROM expiring e
UNION ALL
SELECT 'sold', json_agg(row_to_json(s)) FROM sold s

-- New vehicles: in inventory, not yet posted, HAS PHOTOS
WITH new_vehicles AS (
  SELECT v.stock_number, i.title, i.price, v.year, v.make, v.model, v.mileage,
    v.exterior_color, i.hero_image_url,
    jsonb_array_length(COALESCE(i.image_urls, '[]'::jsonb)) as photo_count

-- Sold vehicles: listed on marketplace but no longer in active inventory
sold AS (
  SELECT ml.vehicle_id, ml.fb_listing_url, ml.posted_at
  FROM marketplace_listings ml

SELECT 'expiring', json_agg(row_to_json(e)) FROM expiring e

SELECT 'sold', json_agg(row_to_json(s)) FROM sold s
